    Method

    List<Coordinate>
    VoronoiZone.getVertices()
     
    List<Coordinate>
    VoronoiService.getVoronoiVertices(List<DelaunayTriangle> triangles)
    Extracts one Voronoi vertex per Delaunay triangle by computing each circumcenter.
    Methods in Unnamed Package with parameters of type Coordinate
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    VoronoiZone.addVertex(Coordinate vertex)
    Appends a vertex to the polygon and recomputes the surface area.
    boolean
    VoronoiZone.contains(Coordinate c)
    Tests whether a coordinate lies inside this zone using the ray-casting algorithm.
    double
    Coordinate.distanceTo(Coordinate c)
    Computes the Euclidean distance between this coordinate and another coordinate.
    double
    VoronoiZone.distanceToCenter(Coordinate c)
    Returns the Euclidean distance from the given coordinate to the zone centroid.
    Hospital
    MapManager.findHospitalByPosition(Coordinate position)
    Finds a hospital by geographic position.
    boolean
    DelaunayTriangle.isInCircumcircle(Coordinate p)
    Checks whether a coordinate lies inside the circumcircle of the triangle.
    void
    MapManager.moveHospital(String hospitalId, Coordinate newPosition)
    Moves a hospital to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
    void
    MapManager.movePatient(String patientId, Coordinate newPosition)
    Moves a patient to a new position and triggers a full recomputation.
    void
    VoronoiZone.removeVertex(Coordinate vertex)
    Removes a vertex from the polygon and recomputes the surface area.
    void
    Hospital.updatePosition(Coordinate newPosition)
    Updates the geographic position of the hospital.
    void
    Person.updatePosition(Coordinate newPosition)
    Moves this person to a new geographic position.
